data.title: Airbus Announces 85 New Orders, Pointers Show Air India Is Purchaser: Report
data.description: Airbus SE reported 50 deliveries and 235 gross orders in Sept 2024, including 85 from Air India. Boeing's Oct deliveries expected to plummet.

data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In GXO Options
Decoding Trump Media & Technology's Options Activity: What's the Big Picture?
ZJK Crafts Small But Sturdy IPO With Its Focus On Nuts-And-Bolts
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	ZJK’s shares rose as much as 36% in their first week of trade on the Nasdaq, despite its relatively small IPO with only 2% of its shares sold
	The maker of fasteners and other components plans to use some of its IPO proceeds to set up a new foundry, possibly in Vietnam


By Edith Terry
